keyFeatures.en: Create and edit videos with advanced tools
keyFeatures.zh: 使用高级工具创建和编辑视频

keyFeatures.en: Collaborate with team members in real-time

description.en: Basic features for personal and small business use
description.zh: 适用于个人和小型企业的基本功能
适用于专业人士的高级功能

weaknesses.en: Limited free tier options for businesses
weaknesses.zh: 免费套餐选项有限，不适合企业用户

targetAudience.en: Individual creators, small businesses, and professionals
targetAudience.zh: 个人创作者、小型企业和专业人士

positioning.en: ClipChamp positions itself as a versatile video creation tool for both personal and professional use.
positioning.zh: ClipChamp 定位为适用于个人和专业用途的多功能视频创作工具
